text.title: Risk Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping the input shape to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the candidate risk have an observable trigger AND a named owner?

conclusion.verdict: reject row; force trigger + owner before accepting

branch.when: trigger_set == true AND owner_set == true AND rationale_present == false

conclusion.verdict: reject scores; require one-line rationale citing source artefact

branch.when: trigger_set == true AND owner_set == true AND rationale_present == true AND per_risk_reserve == true

conclusion.verdict: reject per-risk reserves; sum EMV into single contingency line

branch.when: trigger_set == true AND owner_set == true AND rationale_present == true AND per_risk_reserve == false AND days_since_review > 14

conclusion.verdict: flag stale; trigger weekly review cycle

branch.when: trigger_set == true AND owner_set == true AND rationale_present == true AND per_risk_reserve == false AND days_since_review <= 14 AND deletion_attempted == true
trigger_set == true AND owner_set == true AND rationale_present == true AND per_risk_reserve == false AND days_since_review <= 14 AND deletion_attempted == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: trigger_set=true, owner_set=true, rationale_present=true, per_risk_reserve=false, days_since_review=3, deletion_attempted=false → accept register.
